test_metadata.test_name: SReality Phase 2a Amenity Field Extraction Test
test_metadata.description: Real API testing of Phase 2a amenity fields (AC, security, fireplace, balcony, terrace, elevator)

has_ac.notes: No AC/climate control items found in 12 listings

has_security.notes: No security system items found in 12 listings

has_fireplace.notes: No fireplace items found in 12 listings

issues.description: Balcony items with numeric values (like '3' for 3 sqm) are not being extracted
issues.example: Value: '3' (type: string) - Expected extraction: true, Actual: undefined

extraction_logic.problem: Does not recognize plain numbers as positive indicators
extraction_logic.fix_required: Update isPositiveValue to treat any non-zero number as positive

has_terrace.notes: No terrace items found in 12 listings - may be less common than balconies

issues.description: Elevator items with boolean false value are being incorrectly extracted as true
issues.example: Value: false (type: boolean) - Expected extraction: false, Actual: true
issues.frequency: At least 1 out of 5 elevator items (20%)

issues.description: String values for elevator (e.g., 'Ne', 'No') may not be handled correctly
issues.notes: Not confirmed in test data, but likely issue

extraction_logic.method: isPositiveValue() function on item.value converted to string
extraction_logic.problem: When API returns boolean false, String(false) = 'false' which doesn't match positive indicators, but isPositiveValue doesn't explicitly return false
extraction_logic.current_behavior: Returning true even for false values

list_endpoint.issue: List endpoint does NOT include items array with amenity data

detail_endpoint.note: Items array is only available in detail endpoint, not in list endpoint pagination

most_common_amenities_found.note: Phase 2a does not include has_garage field

amenity_items.name: Balkón
amenity_items.extraction_result: has_balcony: undefined ✗ ISSUE: Numeric value not recognized

amenity_items.name: Balkón
amenity_items.extraction_result: has_balcony: undefined ✗ ISSUE: Numeric value not recognized

amenity_items.name: Výtah
amenity_items.extraction_result: has_elevator: undefined ✗ ISSUE: But appears as true in extraction!

key_findings.finding: API only includes items in detail endpoint, not list
key_findings.impact: Scraper MUST fetch detail endpoint for each listing to get amenity data
key_findings.current_implementation: ListingsScraper needs to be updated to fetch detail endpoints

key_findings.finding: Elevator extraction has critical bug with false values
key_findings.impact: Properties without elevators may be incorrectly marked as having elevators
Properties with balconies (indicated by area like '3' or '13' sqm) are marked as undefined
key_findings.data_quality_impact: Missed enrichment opportunities (50% of balcony items)

key_findings.finding: AC, Security, Fireplace fields not found in test data
key_findings.impact: Either these fields are rare in Czech real estate listings, or extraction terms need expansion
key_findings.recommendation: Test with larger dataset or different regions

key_findings.finding: Garage items appear in API but no extraction field exists
key_findings.impact: Garage information is available in API but not captured in Phase 2a schema
key_findings.recommendation: Consider adding has_garage field to Phase 2a

recommendations.issue: Fix elevator extraction for false values
recommendations.action: Update isPositiveValue() or add explicit false-check in extractElevator()
recommendations.fix: Modify extractElevator to return false when value is false/no/ne, not undefined

recommendations.issue: Fix balcony/terrace extraction for numeric values
recommendations.action: Update isPositiveValue() to recognize numeric values > 0 as positive
recommendations.fix: Modify isPositiveValue to parse numbers and treat non-zero as true

recommendations.issue: Garage items appear in API but not extracted
recommendations.action: Implement has_garage extraction or expand Phase 2a schema
recommendations.fix: Add garage extraction logic similar to elevator, or add has_garage field

recommendations.issue: AC, Security, Fireplace not found in test data
recommendations.action: Expand test dataset or verify Czech term variations
recommendations.fix: Test with 50+ listings or research if different Czech terms are used

recommendations.issue: List endpoint doesn't include items (performance issue)
recommendations.action: Optimize scraper to batch-fetch detail endpoints or use detail endpoint for pagination
recommendations.fix: Consider fetching details in batches or switch to detail endpoint for listings extraction

recommendations.issue: Add more detailed value type handling
recommendations.action: Document API value types (string, boolean, number) in transformer
recommendations.fix: Standardize value conversion to handle all types properly

test_execution_summary.data_quality: Good - all detail endpoints returned valid items arrays
